arts.ttl: Munster player ratings: Crowley, Beirne and Nash the stand-outs in narrow loss at Saints
arts.sum: Took his two tries brilliantly, the first all work-rate and the second a nice line off Crowley. Pushed it a little bit too far at times, but his refusal to accept Northampton’s early supremacy was key to Munster getting back into the game.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest eyeing raid on European giants for standout striker
Joshua Zirkzee ban decision confirmed after lewd gesture in Man Utd win against Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Joshua Zirkzee has escaped a ban by the FA following a controversial celebration during the Red Devils match against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Former Nottingham Forest player set for sensational PL return two years after leaving
arts.sum: Nobody thought we'd see him again!

arts.ttl: Clear hope Nottingham Forest can sign player and provide at least something for Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: Sporting Club de Portugal are hoping Nottingham Forest will step up interest in Marcus Edwards and take him off their hands, even with a percentage going to Tottenham. That’s according to Record, who make it clear Sporting want rid of the forward and are hoping for suitors like Nottingham Forest step up.
